patterns.message: Private to app/swim-log/, except SwimLog (the route's entry point, imported by app/swim-log/page.tsx and its own __tests__ file) and _lib/swim-times-data (its own __tests__ file, __tests__/swim-times-data.test.ts, imports it directly — swim-log's BFF route no longer needs this exception since it moved inside the domain at app/swim-log/api/route.ts). This override is deliberately ONE block covering every domain, each as its own entry in `patterns` below: Biome does not merge style.noRestrictedImports config across separate override blocks when a file matches more than one, so N per-domain override blocks would silently disable protection for every domain but the last one added. When a new app/<route>/ domain is created: add "!app/<route>/**" to this block's `includes`, and one new pattern here blocking "@/app/<route>/_components/**" etc., negating the entry point plus anything a __tests__/*.test.tsx imports directly. If the route segment has glob metacharacters (e.g. "[stroke]"), escape as \[ \] in both includes and group globs, doubled to \\[ \\] in this JSON source since a bare backslash isn't a valid JSON escape.
Private to app/goals/, except GoalsList (the route's entry point).
Private to app/profile/, except ProfileForm (the route's entry point).
Private to app/(auth)/sign-up/, except Turnstile (the route's entry point).
Private to app/strokes/[stroke]/, except DrillsSection (the route's entry point).
Private to the home route (app/page.tsx), except _data/stats (its own __tests__ file imports it directly).
